message:
chore: bump version to 0.2.0 for release

Wide-ranging changes since 0.1.45:
- perf(sync): skip JSONL rewrite when dirty markers don't change content
- perf(storage): skip no-op writes on metadata upserts + export-hash updates
- perf(storage): update_issue is a no-op when no field actually changes
- feat(storage): read-only fast-open path for pure-read commands
- fix(hash,schema): align content_hash algorithm with Go bd + v7 migration recomputes
- fix(storage,sync): magnitude-aware epoch migration + combined-error handling
- fix(csv): escape dash-prefixed values; formula-injection hardening
- fix(storage): validate issue on update path
- test(sync): observe lock waits in e2e (broaden wchan acceptance for loaded hosts)

Also pick up read-only fast-open for `br comments list`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
